name: execute_luau
description: Executes Luau code in Roblox Studio. Returns the result of the executed code or an error message if the code fails to execute.

datamodel_type.description: The target datamodel to operate on, the tool can only be performed in those datamodel types. call get_studio_state to get current available datamodel types. if the target datamodel is not available in current mode, consider using start_stop_play to switch to the desired mode and then use the tools. This is a required argument.
